result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been successfully completed. The input files from the longitudinal cohort study were loaded, merged by NSID, and the household weekly income construct was derived according to the specific requirements. This involved mapping wave-specific missing codes, creating continuous variables for ages 14 and 15, and harmonizing banded income variables across all four ages (14, 15, 16, and 17). The final output containing the NSID and the six derived variables (income14_cont, income14_band, income15_cont, income15_band, income16_band, and income17_band) has been written to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
